# Cognitive Logic
# cognitivelogic.it — AI Governance Infrastructure

## Description
Cognitive Logic builds AI-native semantic knowledge infrastructures.
Systems designed for autonomous agents, auditability, and continuous evolution.

## Core Framework
QEN (Quantum Ethics Network): scoring model for ethical/sustainability impact.
Formula: QEN = (Social x 0.40) + (Environmental x 0.35) + (Territorial x 0.25)

## Data
/data/graph.json — QEN knowledge graph (29 nodes, 40 edges)
/data/qen.json — QEN node definitions

## API
https://api.cognitivelogic.it/analyze — POST, X-API-Key required
https://api.cognitivelogic.it/health — GET, status check

## Contact
info@cognitivelogic.it
